Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Data: Valid username, valid password, valid email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration form.
2. Enter the required information (username, password, email).
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can log in.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has registered.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login form.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in.

Title: Search City
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the city search page.
2. Enter the city name.
3. Click the "Search" button.
Expected Result: The system returns a list of POIs in the specified city.

Title: View City Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has searched for a city.
Test Steps:
1. Select a city from the search results.
2. View the city information page.
Expected Result: The system displays the basic information about the selected city.

Title: Search POI
Preconditions: User is logged in and has searched for a city.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the POI search page for the selected city.
2. Select a POI type.
3. Click the "Search" button.
Expected Result: The system returns a list of POIs of the selected type in the specified city.

Title: View POI
Preconditions: User is logged in and has searched for a POI.
Test Steps:
1. Select a POI from the search results.
2. View the POI information page.
Expected Result: The system displays detailed information about the selected POI.

Title: Insert Event
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid event name, valid event date, valid event location, valid event description.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event insertion page.
2. Enter the required information (event name, event date, event location, event description).
3. Click the "Insert" button.
Expected Result: The event is successfully inserted and can be viewed by other users.

Title: View Events
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the events page for the selected city.
2. View the list of events.
Expected Result: The system displays a list of events in the selected city.

Title: Modify Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and has inserted an event.
Test Data: Valid event name, valid event date, valid event location, valid event description.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event modification page for the selected event.
2. Enter the new required information (event name, event date, event location, event description).
3. Click the "Modify" button.
Expected Result: The event is successfully modified.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the user details
3. Click on the 'Register' button
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and can log in.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has registered
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the email and password
3. Click on the 'Login' button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in.

Title: View City
Preconditions: City is searched and displayed
Test Steps: 1. Click on the city name from the search results
Expected Result: The city details and POIs are displayed.

Title: View POI
Preconditions: POI is displayed in the list
Test Steps: 1. Click on the POI name from the list
Expected Result: The POI details are displayed.

Title: Create Event
Preconditions: City is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create event page
2. Enter the event details
3. Click on the 'Create' button
Expected Result: The event is successfully created and displayed in the user's events list.

Title: Cancel Event
Preconditions: Event is displayed in the user's events list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cancel event page
2. Click on the 'Cancel' button
Expected Result: The event is successfully cancelled and removed from the user's events list.

Title: Verify city search functionality
Preconditions: User is on the home screen
Test Steps:
1. Enter city name in the search bar
2. Tap the search button
3. Verify that the city is displayed on the screen
Expected Result: City information is displayed on the screen

Title: Verify city event listing
Preconditions: User is on the city information screen
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down to the events section
2. Verify that events are listed in chronological order
3. Verify that event titles, dates, and locations are displayed
Expected Result: Events are listed in chronological order with event titles, dates, and locations displayed

Title: Verify logout functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Tap the logout button
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the login screen
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login screen

Title: Verify application performance
Preconditions: User is on the home screen
Test Steps:
1. Perform multiple searches for cities
2. Verify that the application responds quickly and consistently
Expected Result: The application responds quickly and consistently during multiple searches

Title: Verify data privacy and protection
Preconditions: User is using the application
Test Steps:
1. Review the application's privacy policy
2. Verify that the application complies with data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR)
Expected Result: The application complies with data protection regulations and protects user data

Title: Verify application installation
Preconditions: User has downloaded the application
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on the device
2. Verify that the application is installed correctly and takes up approximately 50 MB of storage
Expected Result: The application is installed correctly and takes up approximately 50 MB of storage

Title: Verify application uninstallation
Preconditions: User has installed the application
Test Steps:
1. Uninstall the application
2. Verify that the application and its data are removed from the device
Expected Result: The application and its data are removed from the device

Title: Verify communication stability
Preconditions: User is using the application
Test Steps:
1. Perform multiple actions that require communication with the database or external components (e.g., Google Maps)
2. Verify that there are no interruptions during the communication process
Expected Result: There are no interruptions during the communication process with the database or external components.

Title: Compatibility with Android 7.0 and above
Preconditions: The user has an Android device with version 7.0 or higher.
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on the Android device.
2. Launch the application.
Expected Result: The application should start without any errors or crashes.

Title: Data security and privacy
Preconditions: The user has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions within the application that involve sensitive user data.
2. Check if the data is encrypted and transmitted securely.
Expected Result: The sensitive user data should be encrypted and transmitted securely.

Title: Internet connection requirement
Preconditions: The user has installed the application on their device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to use the application without an internet connection.
Expected Result: The application should not function properly or should display an error message.

Title: Java knowledge requirement
Preconditions: The user has installed the application on their device.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to use the application without knowledge of the Java programming language.
Expected Result: The user should not be able to use the application effectively.

Title: Search for a city
Preconditions: The user is logged into the application.
Test Data: Name of a city in Veneto, Italy.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Enter the name of a city in Veneto, Italy.
3. Attempt to search for the city.
Expected Result: The application should display the results of the search if the entered name matches a city in Veneto, Italy. If the entered name does not match a city in Veneto, Italy, the application should display an error message.

Title: Search for a city
Preconditions: User is on the home page (search city)
Test Data: Name of a city in Veneto
Test Steps:
1. Enter the city name in the search bar
2. Click the search button
Expected Result: The application displays the information of the searched city

Title: View POIs in a city
Preconditions: User has searched for a city and selected the POI function
Test Data: Type of POI to search for
Test Steps:
1. Select the type of POI to search for
2. Click the search button
Expected Result: The application displays the POIs in Veneto of the selected type and their information

Title: Create an event
Preconditions: User is logged in and has searched for a city
Test Data: Event details (start and end date, event type, description)
Test Steps:
1. Click the 'Create event' button
2. Fill in the event details in the form
3. Click the 'Save' button
Expected Result: A new event is added to the city searched

Title: Modify an event
Preconditions: User is logged in with the account of the event creator
Test Steps:
1. Click the 'Modify event' button
2. Fill in the modified event details in the form
3. Click the 'Save' button
Expected Result: The event details are updated

Title: Delete an event
Preconditions: User is logged in with the account of the event creator
Test Steps: 1. Click the 'Delete event' button
Expected Result: The event is deleted and the list of events is updated
